title: What does the next training paradigm look like?
summary: Dwarkesh Patel discusses the next generation of AI training paradigms beyond standard supervised learning. The essay explores concepts like grindability, verifiability, reinforcement learning with verification (RLVR), test-time scaling, and dreaming as potential directions for future model training.
writeup: Dwarkesh Patel examines what AI training could look like after standard supervised learning. The essay works through grindability, verifiability, reinforcement learning with verification (RLVR), test-time scaling, and dreaming as candidate directions for future model training. The framing matters because it organizes proposed post-supervised methods around whether tasks can be ground out and whether their outputs can be verified.
